summary: Tested Remove Photo feature: DELETE /api/students/{student_id}/photo endpoint + edit modal photo display. Found and fixed 2 bugs: (1) Missing Trash2 import causing React crash on Students page, (2) Backend MongoDB projection bug causing 404 when student has no photo_url. All 6 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend fully verified with screenshots.
seed_data_creation: Re-created dummy photos for stu_ac501dd5 and stu_15965c26 after test deletion. Restored photo_url in DB for both students.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Remove photo feature fully tested and working. Backend DELETE /api/students/{student_id}/photo: requires admin/leadership role (returns 401/403 for unauth), clears photo_url from DB ($unset), removes file from disk. Fixed bug: MongoDB projection {photo_url:1,_id:0} returned empty dict {} for students without photo_url, causing `if not student` to be True and raise 404. Fixed by adding student_id:1 to projection and using `if student is None`. Frontend edit modal: data-testid=edit-modal-photo shows photo, data-testid=remove-photo-btn shows remove button. Fixed missing Trash2 import in StudentsPage.jsx (was crashing the entire page). After clicking remove, photo is cleared in-place and students list reloads.

bug1_frontend_crash.root_cause: Trash2 icon used in the remove-photo-btn but not imported from lucide-react
bug1_frontend_crash.fix: Added Trash2 to the lucide-react import in StudentsPage.jsx line 5

bug2_backend_404.issue: DELETE /api/students/{student_id}/photo returns 404 when student has no photo_url
bug2_backend_404.root_cause: MongoDB projection {_id:0, photo_url:1} returns empty dict {} when photo_url field doesn't exist on document. `if not student:` evaluates {} as falsy and raises 404.
bug2_backend_404.fix: Added student_id:1 to projection and changed `if not student:` to `if student is None:`
